Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash For Lack Of Personal Service
Off Calendar Aug-24-2016 Continued To Sep-14-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Elizabeth Karnazes (650-345-9200) appears telephonically as plaintiff/opposing party, In Propria Persona

Attorney, Lisa M. Conner of Flynn Delich & Wise LLP (562-733-2380) appears telephonically as counsel for defendant/moving party, Royal Caribbean Cruises Ltd.

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter. The Court sets aside the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT ROYAL CARIBBEAN CRUISES, LTD'S Motion To Quash For Lack Of Personal Jurisdiction and Improper Service of Process is CONTINUED to September 14, 2016 at 9:30 AM in Department 302 to be heard with other matters, subject to Ms. Karnazes submitting "two paragraphs" of requested information by the close of business on August 25, 2016. Ms. Conner may respond by September 6, 2016. Defense counsel request for admonishment granted; Ms. Karnazes is admonished that failure to submit the requested two paragraphs will result in the tentative ruling heretofore posted, to be confirmed. The Court also ORDERS the hearing on plaintiff's Motion for Leave to File Second Amended Complaint, currently scheduled for August 31, 2016 also to be continued to September 14, 2016 at 9:30 AM in Department 302. The Court further ORDERS there shall otherwise be NO FURTHER FILINGS relating to this matter.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Reyes Hunter, CSR #6576, bus. tel: (530) 339-5023, email: rhunter@sftc.org. (D302)
